Phantom Blade Zero Gets 50-Day Delay

Phantom Blade Zero is delayed and that means the PS5 and PC game won't make its September 2026 debut date.

Yukari Takeba is the next Persona 3 Reload character to join the Persona 5: The Phantom X crossover event.

text:
Hatsune Miku Cinnamoroll XStellar Figure Wears Summer Marine Outfit

The next Hatsune Miku x Cinnamoroll figure will be part of the Sega XStellar line and involve the two in summer sailor costumes.

The post Hatsune Miku Cinnamoroll XStellar Figure Wears Summer Marine Outfit appeared first on Siliconera.

text:

A new Taito FFXIV figure takes the Gimme Cat and Great Gimme Cat from Dawntrail and makes them into figures.

The post FFXIV Gimme Cat Being Turned Into a Figure appeared first on Siliconera.

text:
Pokemon Champions Mobile Versions Arrive on Android and iOS in June

Pokemon Champions is on Nintendo consoles now and will show up on Android and iOS mobile devices later this month.
